title: Chinna Chinna Laali Laali Lyrics Theeran Adhigaaram Ondru
stanzas:
chinna chinna kan asaivil
un adimai aagavaa
chella chella muthangalil
un uyirai vaangavaa

mella mella ennuyiril
unnuyirum asaiyudhe
thulla thulla en idhayam
nammuyiril niraiyudhe

laali laali nee en
thooli thooli

unnai alli yendhiye
oru yugam pogavaa
thalai mudhal kaal
varai panividai paarkavaa

laali laali naanum
thooli thooli
laali laali nee en
thooli thooli

kaalai anaippin vaasamum
kadhil kirangum swaasamum
saagum podhum
udhirndhidaathu
vaa uyire

kadhil udhaikkum paadhamum
maarbil kidakkum neramum
vazhum varaikkum
thaeindhidaathu vaa uyire

aanil thaaimai karuvaagum
eeram poothu mazhaiyaagum
kanneer sugamaai imai meerum
kaalam undhan varamaagum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and longing, portraying the emotions of being deeply connected to someone special.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Theeran Adhigaaram Ondru, the song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional narrative of the film.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Pragathi and Sathya Prakash, both of whom bring a unique charm to the duet.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Chinna Chinna Laali Laali was composed by M Ghibran, known for his captivating melodies.

When was the song released?

The song was released on November 17, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Chinna Chinna Laali Laali, the soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics create a romantic ambiance that resonates with the audience. The song beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and connection, making it a perfect backdrop for the romantic scenes in Theeran Adhigaaram Ondru. The collaboration between Pragathi and Sathya Prakash adds a unique charm, enhancing the overall experience. This duet not only elevates the film's narrative but also evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chinna Chinna Laali Laali from Theeran Adhigaaram Ondru is a delightful romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Pragathi and Sathya Prakash, combined with M Ghibran's mesmerizing composition, this song creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates with listeners. Dive into this melodic journey that perfectly complements the film's narrative and emotional depth.
stanzaMeanings: In the small, small dreams, will I become your servant? Will I take your life in the small, small pearls?
Lullaby, lullaby, I too am a little lullaby.
Slowly, slowly, my heart desires you and your life; it is filled with love in our hearts.
Lullaby, lullaby, you are my little lullaby.
Will you leave me in a time when I hold you? Will I see the offering until the end of time?
Lullaby, lullaby, I too am a little lullaby; lullaby, lullaby, you are my little lullaby.
In the morning, the fragrance of the flowers and the breath of the breeze will not fade away, come, my life.
The path that brings the light and the time that rests in the shadows will not fade away, come, my life.
When the rain falls, the earth will be filled with joy, and tears will flow happily; may your time come soon.
